summary: A clip from a CBS Evening News segment with a CBS NEWS EXCLUSIVE label and a lower-third reading How Minnesota Fraudsters Spent Millions of Taxpayer Dollars. It includes phone-style footage of a poolside table with fruit, glasses, and a bottle overlooking a tropical ocean, an interview with a man in a suit and tie in front of a U.S. flag, and close-ups of printed Old National Bank wire-transfer documents showing dollar amounts such as $131,632.00 USD, $189,787.00 USD, and $197,789.20 USD.

script.scene: Phone-style footage of a poolside table with fruit and glasses overlooking a tropical ocean; lower-third reads How Minnesota Fraudsters Spent Millions of Taxpayer Dollars.
A man in a suit and tie is interviewed in front of a U.S. flag.
Close-ups of printed Old National Bank wire-transfer documents listing dollar amounts.

notable_text: CBS NEWS EXCLUSIVE; How Minnesota Fraudsters Spent Millions of Taxpayer Dollars; OLD NATIONAL BANK; $131,632.00 USD; $189,787.00 USD; $197,789.20 USD
